pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used in the code.
